pageContext.name: Clone Trooper Phase I 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Genetically crafted and outfitted with state-of-the-art equipment, Phase 1 Clone Troopers™ were powerful and loyal soldiers of the Republic Army™. Phase 2 will be rolling out soon, so keep an eye out!  As part of the Faces of the Empire™ Collection, these 1oz pure silver coins are crafted to embody the shape and color of the Phase 1 Clone Trooper's helmet. The detailed design includes extra relief to give the coin additional interest.  Officially licensed, the coin arrives safely stored inside a sleek Star Wars™ branded case, incorporating a large window for easy display. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case, along with the coin's unique number in the limited 10,000 mintage.   Get your blasters ready and join the fight for the Republic™! Order now.
